LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT AAA FLAG & BANNER MFG. CO., INC'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO JULY 18, 2013 TO GIVE AAA FLAG & BANNER MFG. CO., INC. THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B AND 2.6C. AAA FLAG & BANNER MFG. CO., INC. MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS AND THE OPERATIVE PLEADING TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN JUNE 14, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS. JUDGE: MARLA J. LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT AAA FLAG & BANNER MFG. CO., INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS DENIED. PARAGRAPHS 16-17 SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGE THAT DEFENDANT ACTED WITH A CONSCIOUS DISREGARD FOR THE SAFETY OF OTHERS. PARAGRAPH 6 SUFFICIENTLY PLEADS RATIFICATION. DEFENDANT'S MOTION RAISES FACTUAL ISSUES. MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-18-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: t. andrew davies, esq., 415.292.4100, for plaintiff annette yip.
barbara caulfield, esq., 415.836.2020, for defendant aaa flag & banner mfg. co., inc.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT AAA FLAG & BANNER MFG. CO., INC.'s MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is denied. Paragraphs 16-17 sufficiently allege that defendant acted with a conscious disregard for the safety of others. Paragraph 6 sufficiently pleads ratification. Defendant's motion raises factual issues. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-14-2013 Continued To Jul-18-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT AAA FLAG & BANNER MFG. CO., INC'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS Continued to July 18, 2013 to give AAA Flag & Banner Mfg. Co., Inc. the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B and 2.6C. AAA Flag & Banner Mfg. Co., Inc. must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers and the operative pleading to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than June 14, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the opposition papers. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
